description: Perform a price elasticity analysis for 'Technology' products in Oracle Analytics Desktop using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset (C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx). The analysis should verify if lower prices correlate with higher sales volume for the 'Technology' Product Category. The workbook must include a custom calculation named 'Unit Price' defined as Sales / Quantity. The primary visualization should be a scatter plot showing the relationship between Unit Price (X-Axis) and Quantity (Y-Axis) for each Product Name, including a linear trend line. Save the final workbook as 'Price_Elasticity.dva' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents.
